1100.description: Belle 365 Polyclinic in Mirdif's Park Centre brings together multiple medical specialties under one roof, giving families in the area access to everyday healthcare without long commutes. Operating seven days a week with extended evening hours, the clinic is registered with the Dubai Health Authority and designed to handle a wide range of routine and follow-up consultations. Its location inside a busy retail centre makes walk-in visits practical for residents of Mirdif and surrounding neighbourhoods.
reviewSummary: Convenient location inside Park Centre makes it easy to visit after errands.
Friendly staff and short waiting times noted by local Mirdif residents.
Doctors take time to explain conditions clearly before prescribing treatment.

1101.description: Belle Cosmetic Clinic in Jumeirah Lakes Towers operates as a multi-specialty polyclinic with a clear focus on aesthetic and cosmetic medicine. Situated in HDS Tower within the Cluster F section of JLT, it draws professionals living and working nearby who prioritise appearance-related treatments alongside general wellness consultations. The clinic holds a DHA licence and runs Tuesday through Sunday, making it accessible during typical workweek schedules. With a 4.6 Google rating from dozens of verified patients, it maintains solid standing in an area with many competing practices.
reviewSummary: Aesthetic treatments delivered by attentive clinicians in a clean, modern setting.
Patients appreciate the clinic's flexibility with Tuesday to Sunday operating hours.
Staff communicate well and explain cosmetic procedures in detail before proceeding.
Positive post-treatment results reported by multiple reviewers from the JLT area.

1102.description: Belle Vie Therapy and Wellness in Al Barsha has earned an exceptional reputation among Dubai residents seeking holistic and therapeutic care. With 716 Google reviews averaging 4.8 stars, this DHA-licensed polyclinic stands out for the depth and consistency of patient satisfaction. Located in a villa on Hessa Street, it offers an intimate, retreat-style environment quite different from traditional clinic spaces. Operating daily until 10 PM gives working patients the flexibility they need for evening appointments in therapy, wellness, and multi-specialty consultations.
reviewSummary: One of the most highly reviewed wellness clinics in Al Barsha with over 700 patient ratings.
Therapists are described as skilled, warm, and genuinely invested in patient recovery.
Evening hours until 10 PM are frequently praised by working professionals.
The villa setting creates a calm, private atmosphere that patients find therapeutic in itself.
Consistent quality across multiple visit types, from physiotherapy to wellness consultations.

1103.description: Bellevue Medical Center in Deira's Al Rigga district serves a dense residential and commercial catchment with multi-specialty outpatient care. Based in the Al Hadi Plaza, the clinic is accessible via the Al Rigga Road corridor and holds a 4.6 Google rating from over 400 patients, reflecting dependable service quality. Operating seven days a week from 10 AM to 9 PM, it accommodates the varied schedules of Deira's diverse population. The centre is fully DHA-licensed and offers consultations across general medicine and additional specialties.
reviewSummary: Reliable day-to-day medical care for Al Rigga and surrounding Deira neighbourhoods.
Doctors are described as thorough and approachable during general consultations.
Over 400 patient reviews reflect a consistent track record spanning multiple years.
Extended weekend hours make it a practical choice for families and working adults.

1104.description: Benessere Poly Clinic in the Warsan First district of Dubai International City provides multi-specialty outpatient care to one of Dubai's most culturally diverse residential communities. Located in the Persia Cluster, the clinic is DHA-licensed and operates six days a week. With a 4.7 Google rating, it scores well among local residents who depend on accessible, nearby medical services rather than travelling to central Dubai. The Italian-inspired name signals an aspiration toward holistic wellbeing as much as standard clinical care.
reviewSummary: Convenient option for residents of the Persia and surrounding clusters in International City.
Staff are professional and manage appointments with minimal waiting time.
Good range of specialties available for a clinic serving a residential community setting.

1105.description: Berry Hill Polyclinic operates out of the Technic Building on Salah Al Din Street in Deira's Al Muteena district, serving one of Dubai's most transient and working-class residential zones. The DHA-licensed clinic runs Thursday through Sunday and draws patients for general and multi-specialty consultations. With 121 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, it has built genuine loyalty among the local community despite modest scale. Its own website reinforces a degree of organisational maturity beyond a basic walk-in practice.
reviewSummary: High patient satisfaction in a neighbourhood clinic serving the Al Muteena community.
Doctors are accessible and consultations are conducted with care and thoroughness.
The 4.8 rating across 121 reviews signals consistent quality rather than isolated good experiences.
Convenient Thursday to Sunday schedule suits the working patterns of many Deira residents.

1106.description: BeSix Construct Company Clinic is an occupational health facility embedded within the Six Construct labour camp near the Emirates Driving Institute in Al Quoz Industrial Third. Serving the workforce of one of the region's larger construction and engineering companies, the clinic handles routine medical assessments, injury management, and employee health monitoring. It is DHA-licensed and operates Monday through Friday during standard working hours, reflecting its purpose as a workplace health resource rather than a general-access facility.
reviewSummary: Workplace clinic well-suited to the health needs of a large construction workforce.
Staff handle routine assessments and occupational health checks efficiently.
Accessible during standard working hours from Monday to Friday.
Patients appreciate the quick response during workplace medical situations.

1107.description: Bespoke Clinical Services is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic registered to Business Bay, Dubai, offering tailored outpatient care. The name reflects a positioning around personalised treatment pathways rather than high-volume throughput. With a 5-star Google rating from its early patient base, the clinic is in a growth phase building its reputation in one of Dubai's most commercially active districts. It operates Monday through Friday on standard business hours and maintains an active web presence for prospective patients.
reviewSummary: Patients highlight the personalised, attentive approach from clinical staff.
Perfect early Google rating reflects care taken with each patient interaction.
Clean, professional environment suited to the Business Bay professional demographic.

1108.description: Best Clinic LLC in Deira's Al Muraqqabat is a busy multi-specialty polyclinic operating seven days a week from 9 AM to 10 PM, making it one of the more accessible healthcare options along the Al Rigga Road corridor. With 314 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, the clinic has earned strong trust from a large and repeat patient base. The facility's website is aligned to its dental offerings, suggesting particular strength in dentistry alongside its broader multi-specialty profile. DHA-licensed and centrally located, it is well positioned for Deira's mixed residential and commercial population.
reviewSummary: Exceptionally long daily operating hours from 9 AM to 10 PM suit diverse patient schedules.
Over 300 patient reviews average 4.8 stars, indicating reliable and sustained quality.
Dental services draw particular praise from patients seeking specialised care in Deira.
Convenient Al Rigga Road location with easy access for public transport users.

1109.description: Best D.O.C Home Health Care provides round-the-clock home health services to patients across Dubai from its Al Quoz base near Belhasa Driving Centre. Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week, the DHA-licensed agency dispatches nurses and medical staff for in-home consultations, post-operative care, and chronic disease management. With 142 Google reviews at 4.9 stars, the service has built a remarkably strong reputation for responsiveness and clinical quality in the home setting.
reviewSummary: 24/7 availability makes this a reliable option for urgent and scheduled home care needs.
Nursing staff are frequently praised for professionalism and compassion during home visits.
A 4.9 rating from over 140 patients signals exceptional consistency in home healthcare delivery.
Patients recovering from surgery highlight the quality of post-operative home nursing support.

1110.description: Best Dentist LLC in Deira's Al Rigga is a DHA-licensed general dental clinic that has built one of the larger patient review bases in its locality, with 462 Google reviews averaging 4.7 stars. Operating every day from 9 AM to 10 PM, the clinic is positioned for maximum accessibility in a part of Deira that includes significant working and middle-income residential populations. Its website specifically references the Al Rigga location, suggesting a degree of brand investment in local recognition. General dentistry, check-ups, and standard restorative work form the core of its practice.
reviewSummary: One of the most-reviewed dental clinics in Al Rigga with 462 patient ratings.
Extended daily hours from 9 AM to 10 PM accommodate both morning and evening appointments.
Dentists are described as professional and patient-centred during routine and restorative work.
Competitive pricing noted by multiple reviewers relative to other Deira dental providers.
Clean and well-maintained treatment rooms contribute to overall patient comfort.

1111.description: Best Doctor Home Health Care Center operates from Al Barsha First, providing round-the-clock home nursing and medical support to patients across Dubai. DHA-licensed and active 24 hours a day, seven days a week, it coordinates visits from qualified nurses, physicians, and physiotherapists to patients who cannot easily travel to clinic settings. Its 4.9 Google rating from 86 reviewers reflects a strong standard of care delivered in home environments, including post-surgical support, elderly care, and IV therapy.
reviewSummary: Nursing and medical teams are praised for reliability and on-time arrival during home visits.
Particularly valued by families caring for elderly patients or post-operative relatives.
24/7 service coverage addresses both planned visits and late-night medical needs.
A 4.9 rating across 86 reviews reflects exceptionally high patient satisfaction in the home care category.

1112.description: Best Health Medical Center in Muhaisanah Fourth serves one of Dubai's more densely populated residential districts with multi-specialty outpatient care. Operating daily from 8:30 AM to 10 PM, the DHA-licensed clinic provides accessible healthcare to working families in an area where English and Arabic are equally common. With 239 patient reviews averaging 4.9 stars, it ranks among the higher-performing clinics in its catchment area. Proximity to Madeena Hypermarket makes it easy to combine routine shopping with a medical appointment.
reviewSummary: Exceptional 4.9 rating from nearly 240 patients reflects genuinely high-quality community care.
Long operating hours starting at 8:30 AM suit both morning and evening patient needs.
Multilingual staff serve the culturally diverse Muhaisanah community with ease.
Doctors are described as thorough and unpressured during consultations.
Convenient positioning near local retail makes this a practical neighbourhood clinic.

1113.description: Best Kidz Nursery in DIFC operates a DHA-licensed school clinic within its early childhood education facility near Damac Park Towers. The clinic manages routine health monitoring, minor illness response, and first aid for enrolled children, forming an integral part of the nursery's duty-of-care obligations. With 94 Google reviews at 4.9 stars, the nursery as a whole earns exceptional parent satisfaction, with the health component contributing to overall confidence in child safety. It operates Monday through Friday during school hours.
reviewSummary: Parents express high confidence in the nursery's approach to child health and safety.
The in-house clinic is seen as a reassuring feature for families enrolling young children.
Staff communicate proactively with parents about any minor health concerns.
A 4.9 rating across 94 reviews reflects strong trust from the DIFC parent community.

1114.description: Best Life General Clinic in Muhaisanah Second provides basic primary care to workers and residents in a labour accommodation compound run by Galadari Brothers. The DHA-licensed general clinic focuses on everyday medical needs including routine consultations, prescription management, and minor illness treatment. Operating six days a week with extended hours, it serves a captive population with limited nearby alternatives. The associated Best Life Clinics brand suggests broader organisational backing.
reviewSummary: Provides practical and accessible general medical care to Muhaisanah Second residents.
Useful for routine consultations and prescription follow-ups without travelling far.
Extended weekday operating hours accommodate shift workers in the surrounding area.

1115.description: Best Smile Dental Clinic, operating as a branch of Mathew Medical Clinic LLC, is situated in the Al Dhagaya area of old Deira above Shaheen Exchange on Naif Road. The DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic offers dental and broader clinical services to a neighbourhood that includes some of Dubai's oldest commercial streets. With 134 Google reviews averaging 4.8 stars, it delivers strong patient satisfaction in a setting where cost-effectiveness and accessibility matter most. Daily hours from 10 AM to 10 PM give it broad reach across the working day.
reviewSummary: Strong 4.8 rating from over 130 patients in a historically dense Deira commercial neighbourhood.
Dental care at accessible price points relative to more central Dubai providers.
Daily extended hours from 10 AM to 10 PM remove scheduling barriers for most patients.
Convenient location above a well-known Naif Road exchange makes it easy to find.

1116.description: Best Ways Medical Services is a DHA-licensed home healthcare centre based in Al Barsha First, providing scheduled and on-demand home nursing, physician visits, and therapy sessions to patients across Dubai. Operating Monday through Saturday, the agency coordinates visits for wound care, physiotherapy, chronic disease management, and post-discharge support. With only three Google reviews at 5 stars, the service is in its early stages of building a public profile, though the licensing and professional backing reflect established clinical governance.
reviewSummary: Home visits are delivered punctually with professional medical staff.
Useful for patients needing wound care and post-discharge support at home.
Operates six days a week including Saturday for added scheduling flexibility.

1117.description: Beta Pharmacy, a branch of the Aster Pharmacies Group, is located inside Mirdif City Centre adjacent to the Medcare Medical Centre. As part of the Aster network, this community pharmacy benefits from strong supply chain reliability and trained pharmacist oversight. Open daily from 9 AM until midnight, it serves both mall shoppers and patients visiting the nearby medical centre. With 357 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, it ranks well among mall-based pharmacies in Dubai and reflects the consistency expected from the Aster brand.
reviewSummary: Part of the trusted Aster network with reliable medication availability and pharmacist advice.
Late-night hours until midnight serve shoppers and patients across the evening.
Convenient positioning next to Medcare makes prescription pickups seamless.
357 patient reviews at 4.7 stars reflect consistent service quality from a high-traffic location.
Staff are knowledgeable and handle insurance-linked prescription queries efficiently.

1118.description: Beta Star Clinic LLC is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic located in the Jebel Ali Industrial First area, primarily serving the workforce of industrial and manufacturing companies in the zone. As an occupational and general health resource for a large industrial corridor, the clinic handles routine consultations and workplace medical requirements. No Google rating data is currently available, likely reflecting its limited visibility as a facility focused on an industrial rather than public catchment.
reviewSummary: Serves the occupational health needs of workers in the Jebel Ali Industrial zone.
DHA-licensed facility providing routine clinical support to industrial-area residents.
Positioned to address both routine and occupational health requirements efficiently.

1119.description: Beta Star Pharmacy LLC is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving the Jebel Ali Industrial First zone, positioned to meet the medication and pharmaceutical needs of workers and staff in the surrounding industrial facilities. Operating in tandem with the nearby Beta Star Clinic, the pharmacy forms part of an integrated healthcare and dispensing offering for an area otherwise underserved by retail pharmacy options. No public Google rating data is currently indexed, reflecting its specialised catchment.
reviewSummary: Provides essential medication access to workers in the Jebel Ali industrial district.
Operates alongside the Beta Star Clinic for integrated consultation and dispensing.
Fills a practical gap in pharmacy services for a zone with limited retail options.

1120.description: Better Life Clinic in Bur Dubai is a well-established multi-specialty polyclinic occupying the third floor of the Atrium Centre on Khalid Bin Waleed Street. With 762 Google reviews averaging 4.6 stars, it is one of the more frequently reviewed clinics in its district, pointing to a high patient volume and consistent service delivery. The DHA-licensed clinic serves a mix of long-term Bur Dubai residents and transient populations from nearby hotels and short-stay accommodation. Daily extended hours make it one of the more accessible polyclinics in this part of the city.
reviewSummary: One of the most-reviewed polyclinics in Bur Dubai with over 760 patient ratings.
Doctors across multiple specialties are described as professional and attentive.
Khalid Bin Waleed Road location offers strong public transport connectivity.
Extended operating hours serve both resident and transient patients in the area.
Staff manage high patient volumes while maintaining reasonable waiting times.

1121.description: Better Life DRX Physiotherapy Center in Jumeirah Second offers DHA-licensed physiotherapy and rehabilitation services to patients in one of Dubai's more affluent residential neighbourhoods. The multi-specialty polyclinic format suggests additional clinical services beyond physiotherapy, though rehabilitation appears to be the primary focus. With 42 Google reviews at 4.3 stars, the centre is in the process of growing its patient base and public reputation. Jumeirah Street's residential character makes it a convenient option for home-area treatment.
reviewSummary: Physiotherapy and rehabilitation sessions delivered by qualified and experienced clinicians.
Convenient Jumeirah Second location for residents avoiding commutes to central Dubai.
Staff are attentive during treatment sessions and track patient progress carefully.
Growing patient base with solid early reviews in a competitive neighbourhood market.

1122.description: Better Life Pharmacy in Al Quoz Industrial Fourth is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy inside the Grand City Mall, serving both industrial area workers and residents from adjoining neighbourhoods. Operating daily, the pharmacy stocks a general range of prescription and over-the-counter medications. With 39 Google reviews at 3.9 stars, the ratings indicate a functional but uneven patient experience, with scope for improvement in service consistency and waiting times. Location inside a mall provides foot traffic from non-medical shoppers as well.
reviewSummary: Accessible mall-based pharmacy serving the Al Quoz industrial and residential catchment.
Good stock of basic medications and OTC products for everyday health needs.
Reviews suggest some variation in service speed and staff availability at peak times.

1123.description: Bettercare Medical Center LLC is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic located in Dubai International City's Morocco Cluster, providing accessible general and speciality outpatient care to one of Dubai's most densely populated migrant communities. With 17 Google reviews at 4.2 stars, the centre is early in establishing its public profile but shows solid initial patient reception. The Warsan First catchment is primarily lower to middle-income residential, making price sensitivity and accessibility important factors for the clinic's offering.
reviewSummary: Practical multi-specialty clinic for Dubai International City residents needing nearby care.
Staff are professional and handle routine consultations with reasonable efficiency.
Good option for expat residents in the Morocco Cluster without transport access to central Dubai.

1124.description: Beyond 32 Dental and Medical Clinic on Al Wasl Road in Al Safa 2 is a DHA-licensed polyclinic with a clear positioning around dental care alongside broader medical services. The name references the adult dentition, signalling a specialised dental identity within a multi-specialty format. With 43 Google reviews averaging 4.9 stars, it has earned exceptional early patient satisfaction in a premium residential neighbourhood. Al Wasl Road's affluent demographic translates to expectations for quality, personalised treatment that the clinic appears to meet consistently.
reviewSummary: Exceptional 4.9 rating from over 40 patients in the Al Safa 2 premium residential area.
Dental care is delivered with particular skill, reflecting the clinic's specialist identity.
Patients appreciate the calm, unhurried environment compared to high-volume Deira options.
Both dental and general medical consultations receive consistently high marks from reviewers.

1125.description: Beyond Rehab Physiotherapy Center in Al Barsha is a DHA-licensed clinical support facility offering physiotherapy and rehabilitation services from the Pinnacle Building on Sheikh Zayed Road. With 62 Google reviews all rating it at 5 stars, the centre has established a flawless early reputation among patients recovering from sports injuries, post-surgical rehabilitation, and musculoskeletal conditions. The Sheikh Zayed Road address gives it excellent accessibility from a wide Dubai catchment and proximity to corporate and residential zones in Barsha Heights.
reviewSummary: Perfect 5-star rating from 62 patients reflects outstanding physiotherapy outcomes.
Therapists are praised for customising rehabilitation programmes to individual patient needs.
Sheikh Zayed Road location offers easy access from across Dubai by car or metro.
Post-surgical and sports injury patients highlight impressive recovery timelines.
Staff maintain detailed progress tracking across multiple physiotherapy sessions.

1126.description: Beyond Skin Clinic in Mirdif Avenue Mall is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic with a clear dermatology and aesthetics focus, as suggested by its name and positioning in a modern retail mall environment. With 247 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, it has built a substantial patient following in the Mirdif residential catchment. Mall-based clinics benefit from natural footfall and ease of access, and the second-floor location within Mirdif Avenue gives it visibility among a suburban family demographic seeking appearance-related and skin health consultations.
reviewSummary: Skin and aesthetic treatments draw strong reviews from Mirdif's family-oriented community.
Convenient mall location makes drop-in consultations practical for busy residents.
4.7 rating across 247 reviews signals sustained quality over many patient interactions.
Staff are professional and explain treatment options clearly before proceeding.
Mall environment is clean and the clinic maintains high standards of hygiene.

1127.description: BGS Medical Center LLC in Deira's Al Muteena area is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic that has earned an exceptional reputation with 233 Google reviews all at 5 stars. Located in the Prime Adventures Tourism building on Salah Al Din Street, it serves a working-class to middle-income residential catchment with multi-specialty outpatient care. This level of patient satisfaction across such a substantial review base is unusual and suggests a clinic with genuine clinical quality and strong patient rapport, particularly notable in the competitive Deira polyclinic market.
reviewSummary: Perfect 5-star rating from 233 patients makes this one of the top-rated clinics in Deira.
Doctors across specialties are praised for expertise, patience, and clear communication.
Al Muteena location is highly accessible and well-served by public transport.
Patients highlight fast appointment availability and minimal wait times.
Exceptional consistency across a large review base points to systematic quality management.

1128.description: Bilal Pharmacy on Al Maktoum Hospital Road in Deira's Al Wasl district is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy in a historically significant healthcare corridor that includes one of Dubai's oldest public hospitals. The pharmacy serves residents and patients visiting nearby medical facilities, stocking a general range of prescription and over-the-counter medications. With 5 Google reviews at 3.2 stars, the limited feedback reflects a small sample rather than a definitive quality assessment. Its location near a public hospital gives it a practical day-to-day dispensing role.
reviewSummary: Located near Al Maktoum Hospital, making it convenient for patients with prescriptions.
Stocks standard medications for the surrounding Deira residential community.
Limited online reviews mean the current rating reflects a very small patient sample.

1129.description: Bilingual French International School in Nad Al Sheba operates a DHA-licensed school clinic as part of its campus health infrastructure, supporting the medical needs of students enrolled in the French-curriculum institution. The clinic manages first aid, routine health monitoring, illness response, and liaison with families during school hours. No Google rating data is publicly indexed, consistent with school clinics that are not independently reviewable as distinct healthcare facilities. DHA licensing ensures regulatory compliance with UAE school health standards.
reviewSummary: School clinic provides health support to students within the French international school campus.
Manages routine health monitoring and first aid as part of the school's duty of care.
DHA-licensed to operate in compliance with UAE school health regulations.

1130.description: Bin Arab Dental Centre in Al Safa 1 is a DHA-licensed polyclinic with a dental specialty focus, operating from the Al Ferdous building on Al Wasl Road. With 85 Google reviews at a perfect 5-star rating, it has earned exceptional standing in one of Dubai's premier residential areas. The name suggests a specialist dental identity within a multi-specialty registration, and the patient volume is consistent with a well-regarded boutique dental practice serving the Safa, Jumeirah, and surrounding upscale neighbourhoods.
reviewSummary: Perfect 5-star rating from 85 patients in the prestigious Al Safa residential zone.
Dental care is consistently described as thorough, gentle, and professionally delivered.
Al Wasl Road location is easily accessible for patients from Jumeirah and Al Safa.
Patients return repeatedly and recommend the centre to family and friends.
Clinical environment is clean and the team is praised for putting nervous patients at ease.

1131.description: Bin Haider Health Care Center in Barsha Heights is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic located in Tameem House on Al Suhool Street, one of the main commercial corridors in the Barsha Heights free zone. With 119 Google reviews at 4.9 stars, the centre has built exceptional patient satisfaction in an area with a large professional and expatriate residential population. Operating hours and multi-specialty coverage make it well suited to the busy lifestyles of Barsha Heights residents and business district workers nearby.
reviewSummary: Outstanding 4.9 rating from 119 patients in the Barsha Heights professional district.
Doctors are praised for expertise, attentiveness, and efficient consultation management.
Tameem House location is central to Barsha Heights and easily accessible on foot.
Multi-specialty offering reduces the need for patients to visit multiple facilities.
Follow-up care and prescription management are handled smoothly according to reviewers.

1132.description: Bin Hayat New Medical Centre in Al Muraqqabat, Deira is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic serving the residential and commercial population of a central Deira neighbourhood. With 13 Google reviews at 4.2 stars, the centre is in an early phase of building its public profile. Deira's high-density residential character generates consistent demand for accessible outpatient care, and the centre is positioned to meet that need for the Al Muraqqabat catchment, offering general and multi-specialty consultations to a predominantly working-class and middle-income community.
reviewSummary: Serves the Al Muraqqabat community with accessible multi-specialty outpatient care.
Doctors conduct thorough consultations appropriate to the patient's presenting needs.
Convenient Deira location with nearby public transport access.

1133.description: Bin Seray Pharmacy on Oud Metha Road near Lamcy Plaza is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy with 114 Google reviews at 4.6 stars, marking it as a trusted dispensing point in a well-frequented commercial area. Positioned opposite a supermarket, the pharmacy benefits from strong foot traffic from shoppers and patients visiting the nearby Oud Metha medical corridor. Its established rating and substantial review base indicate years of consistent service to the local community, covering both prescription dispensing and over-the-counter health products.
reviewSummary: Well-regarded pharmacy near Lamcy Plaza with 114 patient reviews at 4.6 stars.
Pharmacists are knowledgeable and helpful when advising on medications and supplements.
Convenient positioning opposite a supermarket makes combined shopping and pharmacy trips easy.
Good stock of both prescription and OTC products for the surrounding residential catchment.

1134.description: Bin Sina 44 Pharmacy, a branch of the Ibn Sina Group Pharmacies, is located in the Jumeirah Tower on Sheikh Zayed Road in the Za'abeel district. Part of one of the UAE's established pharmacy chains, it benefits from group-level procurement, pharmaceutical oversight, and trained staff. With 63 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, the branch delivers solid customer satisfaction in a high-footfall business district location. Operating hours align with Sheikh Zayed Road commercial patterns, serving both office workers during the day and commuters in the evenings.
reviewSummary: Ibn Sina brand brings chain-level reliability and consistent medication availability.
4.8 rating from 63 patients reflects strong quality in a competitive Sheikh Zayed Road corridor.
Staff are helpful with insurance-related queries and prescription dispensing.
Convenient for office workers in the Trade Centre and Za'abeel business districts.

1135.description: Bin Sina 52 Pharmacy serves the Jumeirah Park residential community from Al Worood 1 Street in Jumeirah Lakes Towers' adjacent neighbourhood. As a branch of the Ibn Sina Group, the pharmacy brings the consistency and reliability of an established UAE chain to a suburban family residential area. With 82 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, it scores well among local residents who depend on it for regular prescription management and general health products. Operating hours accommodate the daily routines of families and working adults in the community.
reviewSummary: Trusted Ibn Sina branch serving the Jumeirah Park residential community.
Pharmacists are helpful with repeat prescriptions and medication guidance.
4.7 rating from 82 reviews reflects dependable quality for neighbourhood pharmacy needs.
Good stock of both prescription medications and everyday health and wellness products.

1136.description: Bin Sina 54 Pharmacy at Emirates Towers on Sheikh Zayed Road occupies one of Dubai's most prestigious commercial addresses, serving a high-earning professional demographic within one of the city's landmark office and hotel complexes. Part of the Ibn Sina Group, the branch delivers reliable pharmaceutical dispensing in a setting where speed and professionalism are expected. With 56 Google reviews at 4.9 stars, it maintains exceptional patient satisfaction, likely reflecting both product availability and the calibre of its pharmacist team.
reviewSummary: Excellent 4.9 rating from 56 patients in the landmark Emirates Towers complex.
Staff manage high standards expected by a professional and executive patient demographic.
Ibn Sina Group backing ensures stock availability and pharmaceutical quality consistency.
Convenient for professionals based in or visiting Emirates Towers throughout the working day.

1137.description: Bin Sina Emirates Pharmacy in the Mall of the Emirates is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving one of Dubai's busiest shopping destinations. The Ibn Sina Group branch is positioned to serve both mall shoppers and patients visiting the adjoining Medcare Hospital and Aster Clinic facilities. With 259 Google reviews at 4.3 stars, the pharmacy handles substantial daily volumes with generally positive patient reception, though the rating suggests some service pressure from peak mall traffic. Al Barsha First provides a residential backdrop of families and working professionals.
reviewSummary: High-volume mall pharmacy serving one of Dubai's most visited shopping destinations.
Good stock coverage for both prescription and consumer health products.
Staff navigate busy peak periods with reasonable efficiency.
Convenient for patients visiting nearby Medcare and Aster facilities within the mall.

1138.description: Bin Sina Pharmacy in Dubai Healthcare City is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy occupying the ground floor of Building 64 within the healthcare campus. Serving the medical professionals, outpatients, and support staff of one of the region's most concentrated healthcare clusters, the pharmacy operates in an environment where prescription accuracy and pharmaceutical knowledge are paramount. With 105 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, it maintains strong ratings in a demanding healthcare professional environment.
reviewSummary: Well-positioned within Dubai Healthcare City for post-consultation prescription dispensing.
Pharmacists have strong knowledge appropriate to a specialised healthcare campus setting.
4.7 rating from 105 patients reflects consistent quality in a high-stakes dispensing environment.
Good stock of specialised medications required by the clinical campus patient population.

1139.description: Bin Yaber Driving Institute Branch provides DHA-licensed optical support services to driving test applicants near the Danube Metro Station in Jebel Ali Industrial First. As a clinical support centre focused on optical assessment, it conducts vision tests required for UAE driving licence applications, a mandatory step in the process managed by the Roads and Transport Authority. With 667 Google reviews at 4.6 stars, the centre is one of the more reviewed facilities of its type, reflecting the high volume of driving licence applicants using its services daily.
reviewSummary: Handles high volumes of vision assessments for UAE driving licence applicants efficiently.
Staff process optical tests quickly, minimising waiting time for applicants.
4.6 rating from 667 reviews shows consistently positive reception across a large customer base.
Conveniently located near Danube Metro Station for applicants arriving by public transport.
Clear and professional optical testing procedures with timely results communication.

1140.description: Binsina 51 Pharmacy in Discovery Gardens serves the residential community of Jebel Ali Village from The Pavilion retail strip on Street 7. Part of the Ibn Sina Group network, this DHA-licensed community pharmacy brings established brand reliability to a suburban neighbourhood with limited pharmacy alternatives within walking distance. With 85 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, the branch holds the trust of regular customers who rely on it for prescription refills, OTC medications, and general health products.
reviewSummary: Trusted Ibn Sina branch serving Discovery Gardens and Jebel Ali Village residents.
Pharmacists are helpful and knowledgeable for regular prescription management.
Good neighbourhood coverage where alternative pharmacies are less accessible.
4.7 rating from 85 reviews reflects consistent and dependable community pharmacy service.

1141.description: Binsina 55 Pharmacy in Al Barsha First provides DHA-licensed pharmaceutical services from the Al Barsha Boutique Building, serving a mixed commercial and residential catchment in one of Dubai's mid-density urban neighbourhoods. As part of the Ibn Sina Group, the branch maintains consistent product availability and trained pharmacist oversight. With 120 Google reviews at 4.5 stars, it serves the area's daily pharmacy needs with reliable performance and reasonable patient satisfaction.
reviewSummary: Ibn Sina Group branch maintaining reliable pharmacy standards in Al Barsha First.
Good stock of prescription and over-the-counter medications for the local community.
4.5 rating from 120 patients reflects solid if not exceptional service consistency.
Convenient location within an Al Barsha building catering to nearby residential demand.

1142.description: Binsina40 pharmacy inside the Dubai Mall, located near the iconic waterfall and Al Hallab Restaurant on the second floor, is one of the highest-volume pharmacy locations in the UAE. With 7,933 Google reviews at 4.5 stars, it ranks among the most reviewed DHA-licensed pharmacies in Dubai, reflecting the extraordinary daily footfall of one of the world's most visited shopping centres. Part of the Ibn Sina Group, it stocks a wide range of prescription medications, OTC products, and travel health supplies, serving tourists, residents, and healthcare city patients alike.
reviewSummary: One of the most-reviewed pharmacies in Dubai with nearly 8,000 patient ratings.
Stocks an extensive range of medications serving tourists, residents, and event attendees.
Staff handle extremely high daily volumes with reasonable speed and professionalism.
Convenient second-floor Dubai Mall location near the waterfall is easy to find.
Good availability of travel health products and hard-to-find medications.

Located in the Zeenah Building, the pharmacy serves patients from Port Saeed, surrounding Deira districts, and visitors to the nearby Deira City Centre mall. With 104 Google reviews at 4.0 stars, the centre handles a moderate patient volume with generally acceptable outcomes, though the rating suggests room for service improvement. Situated on Al Thanya Street, the clinic has built a formidable reputation for laser treatments, skin health, and aesthetic procedures in a neighbourhood that attracts Dubai's health-conscious and appearance-aware demographic. DHA-licensed and operating across a broad patient base, Biolite represents a benchmark for quality in the aesthetics and wellness clinic sector in Dubai's southern residential belt.

Operating from AB Centre, the clinic targets health-conscious professionals and high-income residents seeking personalised health optimisation beyond standard clinical care. With 39 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, it has strong early patient satisfaction in a segment with significant growth potential across the UAE's wellness-oriented population.
reviewSummary: Precision health and longevity focus appeals to health-conscious professionals in Dubai.

4.8 rating from 39 patients reflects strong initial reception in a niche specialised field.

With 39 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, it has earned strong early patient satisfaction in one of Dubai's fastest-growing mixed-use districts. Located in the Lake Central Tower on Marasi Drive, it serves professionals in one of Dubai's most dynamic commercial and residential districts who seek integrative approaches to health beyond conventional clinical care. With 9 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, the centre has made a strong early impression in a growing segment of Dubai's wellness market.
reviewSummary: Holistic wellness centre with strong early ratings in the Business Bay professional district.
Integrative approach combining physical and mental health is well-received by patients.
Lake Central Tower location is accessible and central for Business Bay residents and workers.
Clinicians take time to understand the whole patient rather than treating isolated symptoms.

1185.description: Body Perfect Holistic Dieting and Weight Control Services in Dubai Marina is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic with a focus on medically supervised nutrition, weight management, and holistic lifestyle medicine. Located in the JAM Marina Residence behind Safeway, it serves a health-conscious Marina demographic where weight management and body composition are active patient priorities. With 190 Google reviews at 4.5 stars, the clinic has built solid patient trust across its specialist weight and nutrition offerings.
reviewSummary: Medically supervised weight and nutrition programmes in a health-focused Marina setting.
Clinicians design personalised dietary plans based on patient health data and goals.
4.5 rating from 190 patients reflects solid long-term satisfaction with programme outcomes.
Marina location suits the active and health-conscious patient demographic seeking medical support.
Patients report sustainable results compared to non-clinical slimming alternatives.

1186.description: Body Perfect Slimming Fitness and Beauty Center near BurJuman Metro is a DHA-licensed clinical support centre offering weight management, slimming, and beauty therapy services in a medically regulated environment. Positioned on Khalifa Bin Zayed Street with metro access, the centre draws patients from Bur Dubai and surrounding areas seeking supervised body management treatments. With 250 Google reviews at 4.4 stars, it has established a healthy patient base in a competitive aesthetic and wellness market.
reviewSummary: Conveniently located near BurJuman Metro for easy public transport access.
Weight management and slimming treatments are medically supervised under DHA licensing.
250 patient reviews at 4.4 stars reflect a well-established presence in the Bur Dubai market.
Staff provide supportive guidance throughout body management and slimming programmes.
Good option for patients wanting medically structured alternatives to commercial slimming centres.

1187.description: Bonex Klinik Orthopedic and Spine in Downtown Dubai is a DHA-licensed polyclinic specialising in orthopaedic assessment, spinal conditions, and musculoskeletal care. Located in the Burj Vista Tower near the Geant Express entrance on Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, the clinic targets professionals and residents of one of Dubai's most prestigious addresses. With 177 Google reviews at a perfect 5-star rating, it has built an exceptional and sustained reputation for orthopaedic expertise in a premium setting.
reviewSummary: Perfect 5-star rating from 177 patients for orthopedic and spine care in Downtown Dubai.
Orthopedic specialists are praised for diagnostic accuracy and treatment effectiveness.
Downtown location in Burj Vista Tower serves professionals and residents of the area.
Spinal condition management draws particularly strong patient praise and repeat visits.
Clinic environment is modern and professional, appropriate for a premium specialty practice.

1188.description: Bonex Pharmacy LLC in the Burj Vista Tower complex is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy co-located with the Bonex Klinik orthopaedic practice in Downtown Dubai. Serving both the clinic's patient population and the broader Burj Vista residential and retail community, the pharmacy provides prescription dispensing and general health product access. With 5 Google reviews at 3.4 stars, the limited feedback base prevents a definitive quality assessment at this stage.
reviewSummary: Pharmacy co-located with Bonex Klinik in the Burj Vista Tower complex.
Provides prescription dispensing for orthopaedic and general patients within the building.
Downtown Dubai location serves both clinical patients and surrounding residential towers.

1189.description: Boom Health LLC is a DHA-licensed telehealth platform operating from Emaar Square in Downtown Dubai, providing digital-first medical consultations to patients across the UAE. As the telehealth model gains traction across the region, Boom Health positions itself at the intersection of technology and primary care, enabling patients to access physicians from home, office, or any connected device. With 21 Google reviews at a perfect 5-star rating, its early patient experience reflects the convenience and quality that digital-first care can deliver.
reviewSummary: Perfect 5-star early rating for a telehealth platform delivering digital medical consultations.
Patients appreciate the convenience of consulting doctors from home without clinic visits.
Physicians are described as attentive and thorough even through the digital interface.
DHA-licensed telehealth model provides regulatory assurance for UAE-based virtual consultations.
Fast appointment availability and minimal administrative friction noted by early users.

1190.description: Booster Medical Centre in Oud Metha is a DHA-licensed multi-specialty polyclinic with 452 Google reviews at 4.8 stars, establishing it as one of the more trusted and frequently visited clinics in the Oud Metha healthcare corridor. Located in the Al Nasr Palace Building near the Oud Metha Bus Stop and Metro Exit, the clinic benefits from excellent public transport connectivity. The high review volume combined with strong satisfaction metrics suggests a well-run practice with a broad, returning patient base.
reviewSummary: 4.8 rating from 452 patients makes this one of the most trusted polyclinics in Oud Metha.
Excellent public transport access via Oud Metha Metro and Bus Stop.
Doctors across multiple specialties are consistently praised for quality of care.
High patient volumes are managed without significant impact on consultation quality.
Patients return regularly and recommend the centre to others in the Oud Metha community.

1191.description: Boots Airport 1 Pharmacy at Dubai International Airport Terminal 1 is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving the millions of passengers transiting through one of the world's busiest aviation hubs. Part of the internationally recognised Boots brand, the pharmacy stocks travel health essentials, prescription medications, OTC products, and wellness items aligned to the needs of both short-haul and long-haul travellers. With 19 Google reviews at 4.2 stars, the airport environment shapes the patient experience, where convenience is the primary service driver.
reviewSummary: Boots brand reliability in the high-demand environment of Dubai Airport Terminal 1.
Stocked with travel health essentials, OTC medications, and last-minute prescription needs.
Convenient for passengers requiring medications before departure or upon arrival.
Staff manage the fast-paced airport environment with reasonable efficiency.

1192.description: Boots Al Barsha Pharmacy in Al Barsha Mall is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy branch of Alshaya International, bringing the trusted Boots brand to a suburban Dubai shopping destination. Serving the Al Barsha Second residential community, the pharmacy provides a full range of prescription and OTC medications alongside the beauty and health product range associated with the Boots name internationally. With 9 Google reviews at 4.9 stars, it has earned exceptional early satisfaction among local shoppers.
reviewSummary: Exceptional 4.9 early rating for the Boots brand in the Al Barsha Mall setting.
Pharmacists provide attentive, knowledgeable service for both prescriptions and OTC queries.
Boots' health and beauty range complements standard pharmaceutical dispensing.
Al Barsha Mall location serves the surrounding residential community conveniently.

1193.description: Boots Amwaj Pharmacy in Jumeirah Beach Residence is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving the waterfront residential and hospitality community along the JBR marina strip. Part of the Alshaya-operated Boots network, the pharmacy caters to the international, tourist, and expatriate population of one of Dubai's most high-profile seaside destinations. With 5 Google reviews at 3.0 stars, the very limited feedback prevents a meaningful quality assessment from the current data.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy in the JBR Amwaj waterfront community serving residents and tourists.
Convenient for visitors and residents needing OTC medications in the beach area.
Boots health and beauty product range available alongside prescription dispensing.

1194.description: Boots Arabian Center Pharmacy in Al Mizhar is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy branch operated by Alshaya International within the Arabian Center mall on Al Khawaneej Street. Serving the Al Mizhar and surrounding eastern Dubai residential communities, the pharmacy provides prescription dispensing and the broader Boots health and beauty range to a predominantly Emirati and long-term expatriate community. Only one Google review is currently indexed, making broader quality assessment premature.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy in the Arabian Center mall serving Al Mizhar and eastern Dubai residents.
Al Khawaneej Street location provides easy access for families from surrounding communities.
Full Boots product range including health, beauty, and prescription pharmacy services.

1195.description: Boots Concourse D Pharmacy at Dubai International Airport is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy positioned within the DXB Concourse D terminal, serving passengers on departure, in transit, and on arrival. Part of the Alshaya International-operated Boots network, the pharmacy provides travel health essentials, prescribed medications, and wellness products to a global passenger audience. With 23 Google reviews at 4.7 stars, it maintains strong satisfaction metrics for an airport retail pharmacy operating under significant time pressure.
reviewSummary: 4.7 rating from 23 passengers reflects strong service quality in a demanding airport setting.
Travel health products and prescription medications are readily available pre-departure.
Staff are efficient and helpful during what are often time-sensitive passenger interactions.
Boots brand familiarity reassures international travellers seeking trusted pharmacy services.

1196.description: Boots Dubai Mall Pharmacy, operated by Alshaya International, is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy inside the world's largest shopping mall in the Downtown Dubai Burj Khalifa district. Serving one of the highest-footfall retail environments globally, the pharmacy provides prescription medications, OTC health products, and the Boots beauty and wellness range to shoppers, tourists, and healthcare city patients. With 7 Google reviews at 4.4 stars, the initial patient feedback is positive for a high-traffic mall pharmacy.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy inside Dubai Mall serving a global shopper and tourist audience.
Good stock of prescription and OTC medications for a high-volume mall environment.
Boots health and beauty range is an added draw for shoppers beyond pharmacy needs.
Staff handle the demanding throughput of one of the world's busiest retail settings.

1197.description: Boots Festival City Pharmacy in Dubai Festival City Mall is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy operated by Alshaya International, serving the retail and dining destination on the Creek waterfront. The pharmacy provides prescription dispensing, OTC medications, and the Boots consumer health and beauty range to festival city visitors, adjoining hotel guests, and east Dubai residential communities. With 49 Google reviews at 3.7 stars, there is scope for improvement in patient experience at this location.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy in Dubai Festival City Mall serving the Creek waterfront destination.
Good access to Boots health, beauty, and OTC product range for shoppers.
Reviews suggest some inconsistency in service experience compared to other Boots branches.
Convenient for hotel guests and visitors to the Festival City waterfront area.

1198.description: Boots Marina Mall Pharmacy in Dubai Marina is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy within Marina Mall, serving the waterfront residential and commercial community of one of Dubai's most desirable addresses. Part of the Alshaya-operated Boots network, it provides prescription dispensing, OTC medications, and the Boots health and beauty range to Marina residents, Jumeirah Beach hotel guests, and marina lifestyle consumers. With 32 Google reviews at 3.6 stars, the current rating suggests an uneven patient experience.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy in Marina Mall serving Dubai Marina's residential and tourist population.
Convenient for residents and visitors needing medications in the marina waterfront setting.
Boots health and beauty product range available alongside standard pharmacy services.
Reviews indicate some variability in staff responsiveness and waiting time management.

1199.description: Boots Mirdif Pharmacy in City Centre Mirdif, operated by Alshaya International, is a DHA-licensed community pharmacy serving one of Dubai's largest suburban shopping destinations on the E311 highway. The pharmacy provides prescription dispensing, OTC health products, and the signature Boots health and beauty range to the Mirdif, Rashidiya, and Nad Al Sheba residential communities. With 48 Google reviews at 3.1 stars, the location faces notable patient experience challenges relative to the Boots network average.
reviewSummary: Boots pharmacy in City Centre Mirdif serving the wider Mirdif and Rashidiya communities.
Good product range including the full Boots health and beauty selection.
Current reviews suggest service consistency is below the standard expected of the Boots brand.
Convenient E311 highway location for car-driving suburban residents of east Dubai.
